_comment: Filesystem MCP — secure read/write access to specified directories outside CWD. Useful when agents need to access shared config, reference projects, or multi-repo setups. Only exposes directories you explicitly allow.
_install: claude mcp add filesystem -s user -- npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem /path/to/allowed/dir1 /path/to/allowed/dir2
_security: ONLY exposes directories listed in args. Never add home directory root or system paths. Use the most restrictive paths possible. Example: allow ~/projects but NOT ~/.
